# base

**Instance Property**

The row’s underlying data frame.

## Declaration

```swift
var base: DataFrame { get }
```

## Inspecting a Row

- **count**: The number of columns in the row.
- **index**: The row’s index in the underlying data frame.

items.description: The number of columns in the row.
items.name: count

items.description: The row’s index in the underlying data frame.
